zh.lifeSummary: 當Rebecca Hills於1634年4月出生在英國英格蘭艾可馬爾頓時，她的父親Joseph Hills Sr.32歲，母親Rose Clarke30歲。她於1652年4月1日與Thomas Green Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1674年6月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rebecca Hills于1634年4月出生在英国英格兰艾可馬爾頓时，她的父亲Joseph Hills Sr.32岁，母亲Rose Clarke30岁。她于1652年4月1日与Thomas Green Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1674年6月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hills
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hill
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Rebecca Hills was born in April 1634, in Maldon, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Joseph Hills Sr., was 32 and her mother, Rose Clarke, was 30. She married Thomas Green Jr. on 1 April 1652, in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 6 June 1674, in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 40.

Elle a épousé Thomas Green Jr. le 1 avril 1652, à Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 juin 1674, à Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 40 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Hills è nata il nel aprile 1634 nel Maldon, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Joseph Hills Sr., aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Rose Clarke, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Green Jr. il 1 aprile 1652, nel Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 giugno 1674, nel Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rebecca Hillsが1634年4月にイギリスイギリスエセックスマルドンで生まれた時，父Joseph Hills Sr.は32歳，母Rose Clarkeは30歳であった。1652年4月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンでThomas Green Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1674年6月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンで40歳で死去した。

ko.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든
ko.lifeSummary: Rebecca Hills(이)가 1634년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 맬던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joseph Hills Sr.(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rose Clarke(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1652년 4월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에서 Thomas Green Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1674년 6월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rebecca Hills родилась апрель 1634 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Joseph Hills Sr. было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Rose Clarke, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Green Jr. 1 апреля 1652 г. в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 6 июня 1674 г. в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 40 лет.
